name: slack
description: Send and read Slack messages across workspace channels

tools.name: slack_channels
tools.description: List all Slack channels in the workspace
tools.planner_hint: Use to list all available Slack channels. No arguments needed.

tools.name: slack_send
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel
tools.planner_hint: Use to send a Slack message to a channel. Format: channel=general text=your message here

tools.name: slack_read
tools.description: Read recent messages from a Slack channel
tools.planner_hint: Use to read the last 10 messages from a Slack channel. Format: channel=general
